trades.reasoning: Weakest holding at -2.8% with score 75 and limited upside catalysts — rotating into a score-95 name to upgrade portfolio quality on a risk-on day
Score 95 with RSI in the bullish sweet spot (63), MACD crossover confirmed, and price well above SMA-20 — ideal setup in a broad market rally led by large-cap tech

decisions.briefing: Market is firmly risk-on with NASDAQ up 1.6% — a strong tailwind for large-cap tech. We're at the 3-position cap, so I'm rotating out of TSLA (weakest holding, -2.85%, lowest score at 75) and upgrading into AAPL (score 95, clean momentum signals). COIN is running well at +5.3% and META is essentially flat but holding good technicals — both are worth keeping.

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged on April 22 in a broad risk-on session, with the NASDAQ gaining 1.6% and the S&P 500 rising 1.0%, driven by easing trade-war anxieties and renewed investor appetite for growth stocks. Large-cap technology names led the charge as cooling inflation expectations reduced pressure on the Fed to stay restrictive. The session reflected a classic 'buy the dip' rotation as institutional money moved back into momentum names after recent volatility.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於4月22日全面走強，呈現明顯的風險偏好格局，那斯達克指數上漲1.6%，標普500指數上漲1.0%。市場情緒好轉，主要受惠於貿易緊張局勢緩和，以及投資者對通脹降溫的預期升溫，令聯儲局維持緊縮政策的壓力有所減輕。大型科技股領漲，機構資金借機回補近期拋售的強勢股，展現典型的「逢低買入」操作模式。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Portfolio rotation means selling a weaker position and using those funds to buy a stronger one — rather than just holding what you have. Today we sold TSLA (score 75, -2.8%) to buy AAPL (score 95, fresh breakout) because we hit the 3-position cap. Good rotation improves your 'average quality' without taking on more risk.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「投資組合輪動」是指賣出表現較弱的持倉，將資金轉移到更具潛力的標的，而非一味持有現有股票。今日我們因持倉已達上限，將得分較低（75分）且下跌2.8%的特斯拉換成得分高達95分、技術突破確認的蘋果。適時輪動能在不增加整體風險的前提下，提升投資組合的整體質素。
